meta.question: Which document contains the top-level APS requirments imported from DORRS?
meta.finalAnswer: No specific document was found that contains the top-level APS requirements imported from DOORS. The requirements are stored in a package hierarchy: "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" → "DRD APS" (Design Requirements Document - APS), which contains interface requirements like STR to APS ICD, APS to SER ICD, SCMS to APS ICD, APS to OSS ICD, TCS to APS ICD, M1CS GLC to APS ICD, APS to CSW ICD, and APS to DMS ICD. However, this package structure is not associated with any document element in the model.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("DORRS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("requirement"))) 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("DOORS"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?doc ?docName ?elem ?elemName WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), LCASE("APS")))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
    ?doc vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
    ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?owner ?ownerName ?ownerType WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?elemName)), LCASE("APS")))
  OPTIONAL { ?elem vocab:Element_owner ?owner . ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName . ?owner rdf:type ?ownerType }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Package_packagedElement+ ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop ?count WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?pkg ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?elemName ?type WHERE {
  ?pkg vocab:MDObject_ID "_2ca33d85-e793-40fa-9f3a-b3c90e37fd87" .
  ?pkg ?prop ?elem .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?elemName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?doc ?docName WHERE {
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?doc ?docName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  ?req vocab:Element_owner+ ?doc .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?owner ?ownerName ?ownerType WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  OPTIONAL { 
    ?req vocab:Element_owner ?owner .
    ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
    ?owner rdf:type ?ownerType .
  }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?doc ?docName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("ICD")))
  ?req vocab:Element_owner+ ?pkg .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "DRD APS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner+ ?doc .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>

PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?doc ?docName ?req ?reqName WHERE {
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("Requirements Flow-down")))
  ?doc vocab:Element_ownedElement+ ?req .
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?req ?reqName ?owner ?ownerName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_name ?reqName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("APS")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("imported")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?reqName)), LCASE("DOORS")))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?req vocab:Element_owner+ ?owner .
    ?owner vocab:NamedElement_name ?ownerName .
  }
}

  ?req vocab:Element_owner+ ?pkg .

  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("imported")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("DOORS")))

    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/document/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520L3%2520Requirements::TMT-APS%2520L3%2520Requirements>
    <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/document/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520Requirements%2520Flow-down::TMT-APS%2520Requirements%2520Flow-down>

  ?req vocab:Element_owner+ ?pkg .
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name "DRD APS" .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner+ ?topPkg .
  ?topPkg vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" .
  ?topPkg vocab:Element_owner+ ?doc .
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
}

request.answer: No specific document was found that contains the top-level APS requirements imported from DOORS. The requirements are stored in a package hierarchy: "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" → "DRD APS" (Design Requirements Document - APS), which contains interface requirements like STR to APS ICD, APS to SER ICD, SCMS to APS ICD, APS to OSS ICD, TCS to APS ICD, M1CS GLC to APS ICD, APS to CSW ICD, and APS to DMS ICD. However, this package structure is not associated with any document element in the model.
